task: Transcribe the contents of video scene_56_4K_2023_06_01.mp4 by watching it in VLC player (located in Download) and writing the sequence of strings shown on each frame to the text file scene_56_4K_2023_06_01_transcription.txt in Markor as a comma separated list. For example, if the first frame shows the text "edna" and the second frame shows the text "pineapple", then the text file should contain only the following text: "edna, pineapple".
